title: BarkinMad Coins
description: Earn BarkinMad Coins while playing ZXSnake and unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.
summary: BarkinMad Coins reward your progress in ZXSnake and unlock cosmetic content throughout the ZX Series.
heroImageAlt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series rewards

images.caption: Earn and spend BarkinMad Coins across the ZX Series.

sections.heading: What Are BarkinMad Coins?
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are the shared reward system used across supported ZX Series games.
As you play ZXSnake, you'll earn coins that can be used to unlock cosmetic rewards across the wider ZX Series.

sections.heading: Earn Rewards Through Gameplay
paragraphs: Every game helps you earn BarkinMad Coins, giving you another reason to keep improving your high scores and unlocking new achievements.
Coins reward regular play without changing the classic arcade gameplay, making progression rewarding while keeping every game fair.

featureShowcases.heading: Play, Earn, Unlock
featureShowcases.summary: BarkinMad Coins reward regular play and unlock cosmetic content across the ZX Series.
body: Every game of ZXSnake helps you earn BarkinMad Coins, encouraging you to improve your skills, survive longer, and chase even higher scores.
Combined with achievements and leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins create a shared progression system that connects every supported ZX Series game.
bullets: Unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.

image.caption: Every game brings you closer to your next unlock.

summary: Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.
